creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
Usually when you have to store persistent data you don't need a
full-blown database server, just a ASCII database would do the trick.

AsciiDB::Tag allows you to access a simple ASCII database using a perl
hash variable. The database format is straightforward so you can edit it
by hand if you need so. Each record is stored into a file, and a record
is just a set of values tagged by the field name.
